table.name: etechflow_str_method
table.comment: ETechFlow Shipping Table Rates — shipping method definitions

column.name: method_id
column.comment: Internal method ID

column.name: code
column.comment: Stable machine code (e.g. 'uk_next_day'); used in carrier_method composition

column.name: name
column.comment: Admin/default-store label (per-store-view labels live in *_method_label)

column.name: is_active
column.comment: Method on/off

column.name: sort_order
column.comment: Display order at checkout

column.name: min_rate
column.comment: Minimum charge clamp (NULL = no min)

column.name: max_rate
column.comment: Maximum charge clamp (NULL = no max)

column.name: multi_type_mode
column.comment: When cart has multiple shipping types: 'sum' | 'min' | 'max'

column.name: free_shipping_compatible
column.comment: Honour Magento native free-shipping promotion (set false to ignore promo for this method)

column.name: use_price_after_discount
column.comment: When TRUE, the cart subtotal used for the subtotal_from/_to filter AND the rate_percent formula term is the post-discount subtotal. When FALSE (default), uses the pre-discount subtotal. Mirrors Amasty's Use Price After Discount flag (per-method, not per-rate).

column.name: use_price_including_tax
column.comment: When TRUE, the cart subtotal used by this method includes tax. When FALSE (default), the subtotal is the pre-tax amount. Combines with use_price_after_discount for the four subtotal modes Amasty exposes.

column.name: ship_for_free_types
column.comment: Comma-separated lowercase shipping_type values that this method should ship at zero cost. Per-shipping-type free-shipping override: when a matching rate's shipping_type appears in this list, that group's cost contribution is zeroed before the multi-type aggregation. Wildcard rates (NULL shipping_type) are unaffected. NULL/empty = no overrides. Mirrors Amasty's 'Ship These Shipping Types for Free' multiselect.

column.name: store_view_ids
column.comment: Method-level store-view scope. Comma-separated list of Magento store IDs this method applies to. NULL = applies to ALL store views. RateMatcher short-circuits methods whose scope doesn't match the cart's store. Mirrors Amasty's per-method 'Visible in Store View' setting.

column.name: customer_group_ids
column.comment: Method-level customer-group scope. Comma-separated list of customer-group IDs this method applies to. NULL = applies to ALL customer groups. Distinct from etechflow_str_rate.customer_group_id which is the per-rate filter; this column is the per-METHOD scope evaluated before any rates are even loaded.

column.name: use_volumetric_weight
column.comment: When TRUE, RateMatcher computes a 'chargeable weight' = max(cart_weight, volumetric_cm3 / volumetric_divisor) and uses it for both the weight-range filter and the per-kg formula term. When FALSE (default), cart_weight is used unchanged. Mirrors Amasty's per-method 'Use Volumetric Weight' flag.

column.name: volumetric_divisor
column.comment: Per-method volumetric-weight divisor (cm³ per kg). Common courier values: DHL/FedEx air 5000; FedEx ground 6000; Royal Mail Tracked 5000. NULL = use the carrier-default 5000. Only consulted when use_volumetric_weight=TRUE.

column.name: settings_json
column.comment: Method-level JSON settings — volumetric weight config, customer-group restrictions, store-view labels, etc.

table.name: etechflow_str_rate
table.comment: ETechFlow Shipping Table Rates — individual rate rules

column.name: rate_id
column.comment: Internal rate ID

column.name: method_id
column.comment: FK to etechflow_str_method.method_id

column.name: country_code
column.comment: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country (NULL = match any country)

column.name: region_code
column.comment: State / region code (NULL = match any)

column.name: city
column.comment: City name (NULL = match any)

column.name: zip_from
column.comment: Postcode range start (NULL = no constraint); alphanumeric — UK/CA postcodes supported

column.name: zip_to
column.comment: Postcode range end (NULL = no constraint)

column.name: weight_from
column.comment: Cart weight range start in store unit (NULL = no min)

column.name: weight_to
column.comment: Cart weight range end (NULL = no max)

column.name: qty_from
column.comment: Cart item qty range start

column.name: qty_to
column.comment: Cart item qty range end

column.name: subtotal_from
column.comment: Cart subtotal range start

column.name: subtotal_to
column.comment: Cart subtotal range end

column.name: customer_group_id
column.comment: Comma-separated customer group IDs (NULL = match all)

column.name: shipping_type
column.comment: Value of product shipping_type attribute (NULL = match all)

column.name: rate_base
column.comment: Base flat charge for this rule

column.name: rate_per_product
column.comment: Additional charge per product/item in cart

column.name: rate_per_kg
column.comment: Additional charge per unit of weight (kg or store unit)

column.name: rate_percent
column.comment: Additional percentage of cart subtotal (0-100)

column.name: weight_unit_conversion_rate
column.comment: Per-rate weight unit conversion factor. cart_weight is DIVIDED by this before the per-kg formula. 1 = no conversion. 2.2046 converts lbs→kg, 0.4536 converts kg→lbs. Mirrors Amasty's Weight Unit Conversion Rate field.

column.name: delivery_days
column.comment: Estimated delivery days for this rate — integer days, used for the legacy '(X days)' suffix and for choosing the longest-delivery winner during {day} template interpolation

column.name: delivery_label
column.comment: Free-text label used to substitute the {day} placeholder in the method name (e.g. 'to Canada, 5 working days'). Overrides the integer delivery_days for display. NULL = fall back to integer delivery_days, or empty if both unset.

column.name: name_delivery
column.comment: Free-text label used to substitute the {name} placeholder in the method name (e.g. 'Royal Mail Tracked 24'). NULL = empty substitution.

column.name: comment
column.comment: Optional comment displayed under the method at checkout (safe HTML allowed)

column.name: sort_order
column.comment: Order when multiple rates match — lower = wins. 0 = use deterministic fallback.

column.name: is_active
column.comment: Per-rule on/off without deleting the row

table.name: etechflow_str_version
table.comment: ETechFlow Shipping Table Rates — versioned snapshots for rollback (differentiator)

column.name: version_id
column.comment: Internal version ID

column.name: method_id
column.comment: FK to etechflow_str_method.method_id

column.name: label
column.comment: Merchant-supplied label ('Q3 2026 rates', 'pre-Black-Friday') or auto-generated timestamp

column.name: snapshot_json
column.comment: Full method + rates state at version time — JSON blob, restored on rollback

column.name: created_by
column.comment: Admin username who created the version
